name: Minted Melon Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the boiling water with the lemon and lime gelatin until dissolved.
2. Stir in the cold water, peppermint extract, and melon balls.
3. Spoon the mixture into a mold lined with a lettuce leaf.
4. Add the coconut cream dressing on top.
5. Place garnishes around the mold.
6. Refrigerate until set.
7. Remove from the mold and serve.
